description: Celebrate the joy of Easter with our vibrant, animated email template. This creative and colorful design features an adorable bunny, ready to deliver easter eggs in a light, pastel palette of spring green and soft orange. This template is perfect for e-commerce promotions, offering a delightful way to announce free shipping or delivery offers during the Easter season. Its freshness and joyful vibe will certainly catch the attention of your customers. Our template also includes a tracking feature, making it easier to manage transportation and shipment details. Whether it's for an Easter event or a seasonal promotion, this animated email template brings a lively touch to your campaign while maintaining a professional appeal.
short_description: Celebrate Easter with our vibrant, animated email template. Perfect for e-commerce promotions, offering free shipping or delivery offers. Features an adorable bunny, pastel palette of spring green and orange. Includes a tracking feature for managing transportation and shipment. Ideal for Easter events or seasonal promotions.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
